text_excerpt: News | Greg Smith MP Skip to main content Main navigation About Greg Smith MP News Campaigns Listening to you Parliament Surgeries Contact News Meetings with HS2 Friday, 1 May, 2026 Issues relating to HS2 continue to dominate my week. Earlier I convened a meeting with HS2 Ltd Chief Executive Mark Wild with Murray Cooke from the Wendover HS2 Action Group, Bucks Councillor Peter Strachan and Wendover Parish Councillor George Atwell to discuss concerns relating to noise modelling once the railway is operational. Detailed discussion - and will keep pushing on this to ensure noise...
